heading: Time limit on agency consideration of completed applications
label: 4807 Time limit on agency consideration of completed applications

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Each Federal banking agency shall take final action on any application to the agency before the end of the 1-year period beginning on the date on which a completed application is received by the agency.

children.heading: Waiver by applicant authorized
children.label: b Waiver by applicant authorized
children.text: Any person submitting an application to a Federal banking agency may waive the applicability of subsection (a) with respect to such application at any time.
